holdings.infoBox: FMQQ is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bajaj Finance stock at 8.48%, MercadoLibre at 8.11%, Reliance Industries at 7.99%, Eternal at 7.95%, and Nu Holdings at 7.06%.

overview.description: The FMQQ Next Frontier Internet ETF (FMQQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FMQQ The Next Frontier Internet index. The fund is a passively managed fund that invests in internet and e-commerce companies from emerging and frontier markets. Securities are selected and weighted by market-cap. FMQQ was launched on Sep 28, 2021 and is issued by EMQQ Global.
infoTable: FMQQ The Next Frontier Internet Index
